matched_facts: Gifts received from the same donor within a three-year period are aggregated when computing the 7,500 euro threshold — i.e., all gifts from the same giver during any rolling three-year window are added together, and gift tax becomes payable once the cumulative amount reaches 7,500 euros.
missed_facts: Under the Finnish Inheritance and Gift Tax Act (perintö- ja lahjaverolaki, PerVL 18 §), as updated effective 1 January 2026, a gift recipient (lahjansaaja) is liable for gift tax (lahjavero) only if the value of the gift is at least 7,500 euros.

Under the Finnish Tax Administration's decision on the calculation bases for withholding tax percentages on wage income for 2026 (Verohallinnon päätös ennakonpidätysprosenttien laskentaperusteista palkkatuloa varten ...
vuodelle 2026), the withholding tax percentage (ennakonpidätysprosentti) is confirmed in increments of half a percentage point and rounded upwards.
It can be at most 60.0 percent.

matched_facts: The maximum annual amount of yleisradiovero is 160 euros.
missed_facts: Below that 15,150 euro threshold no broadcasting tax is owed.

It is not levied on persons who were limitedly tax-resident for the whole year, nor on natural persons or estates whose home municipality is in the Åland province (those persons pay instead the Åland media fee, 128 euros).

According to the Finnish Tax Administration's 2026 withholding decision (section 4.3.1), the employee pension insurance contribution (eläkevakuutusmaksu / TyEL employee share) used as a deduction from withholding-taxable wages and seafarer income is 7.30 percent of the gross pay.

The contribution starts to accrue from the beginning of the calendar month following the month in which the employee turns 17, and continues until the upper age limit of the insurance obligation is reached.
That upper age limit is staggered by birth cohort: 68 years for persons born in 1957 or earlier, 69 years for persons born 1958-1961, and 70 years for persons born in 1962 or later.

Branded tote bags (~5 euros each): These are NOT taxable income because they qualify as 'tavanomaiset mainoslahjat' (ordinary advertising gifts) — items of low value bearing the advertiser's logo that cannot easily be converted into cash.

(a) Annual amounts: - Bicycle commuter (12 km each way × 2 × 220 days = 5,280 km/year):   Bicycles, including e-bikes (sähköpyörä), are deducted as a flat 100 euro per year — distance and number of commuting days do not matter.

matched_facts: (c) Yes — 200,000 EUR vastly exceeds the gift-tax threshold.
missed_facts: From 1.1.2026 the threshold for taxable gifts is 7,500 EUR (gifts received from the same donor within a rolling 3-year period are aggregated against this limit).

Under the Tax Administration's guidance on the VAT treatment of staff meals (Henkilöstöruokailun arvonlisäverotuksesta), where the employer's own indirect costs have not been separately determined, the taxpayer may use 22% of direct costs as a proxy for indirect costs.
With direct costs of 7.00 EUR/meal: indirect costs = 22% × 7.00 = 1.54 EUR, so the total (direct + indirect) cost per meal is 8.54 EUR.

This 8.54 EUR figure is the basis for assessing the taxable fringe benefit (compared with the meal benefit reference value of 8.80 EUR for 2026; if the cost lies in the 8.80–14.00 EUR band, the fringe benefit value is 8.80 EUR, otherwise the actual cost-incl-VAT applies).

The reduced restaurant and catering services VAT rate of 13.5% is applied on that 8.54 EUR base (i.e., own-use VAT = 13.5/100 × 8.54 = approximately 1.15 EUR per meal), as restaurant and catering services are taxed at the reduced 13.5% rate.

(a) A työehtosopimus that has been confirmed yleissitova (generally binding) by the yleissitovuuden vahvistamislautakunta is binding on every employer in the sector under Työsopimuslaki 2:7, regardless of whether the employer is a member of an employers' federation.

Apteekki Oy must therefore observe at minimum the wage and other employment terms of the Apteekkien työntekijöiden työehtosopimus on every employment contract within the agreement's scope - any work contract term in conflict is void and the TES term applies in its place (see Työehtosopimuslaki 6 §).

(b) The worker can demand the unpaid wages directly from the employer, then take the dispute to the general district court (käräjäoikeus) since a non-organized employer's TES dispute follows ordinary civil-court procedure rather than the työtuomioistuin route reserved for parties bound to the TES.

matched_facts: Under this simplification, Company A, acting as the intermediary, does not need to register for VAT in Sweden.

Instead, Company A reports the acquisition as an intra-Community acquisition in Finland and the subsequent supply as a zero-rated intra-Community supply to Company C in Sweden, using the special code for triangular transactions on its VAT return and EU sales listing.
